glyph.glyphName: LUSHOOTSEED LIGATURE SMALL D AND SUPERSCRIPT Z

app.rdg: 1. A, o, askro kwi boku gwalh Sherk-Siam sgwadgwad al ku astlelduhched s'tewielh?
1. 툾a 툾u 툾톛sq퉢퉝u툾 k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q si툾ab sg퉝adg퉝ad 툾al k퉝i 툾톛st톫ildx퉝c팳톛d st퉢iwi톫.
1. is Q gather the all from sky nobleman talk+talk in the believing+I religion
1. Is there a collection of all the sayings from God in the religion that I believe in?
E, a, askro kwi boku gwalh Sherk-Siam sgwadgwad al ku astelduhched s'tewielh.
툾i, 툾a 툾톛sq퉢퉝u툾 k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q si툾ab sg퉝adg퉝ad 툾al k퉝i 툾톛st톫ildx퉝c팳톛d st퉢iwi톫.
yes, is gather the all from sky nobleman talk+talk in the believing+I religion
Yes, there is a collection of all the sayings from God in the religion that I believe in.
2. Tsahadilh o elesapot ololob eku sesale ku tu hoyud kwa astlelduhched s'tewielh?
2. c톛di톫 툾u 툾톛 lesapot 툾ulub 툾i k퉝i s톛sa툾li툾 k퉝i tuhuyud k퉝(i) 툾톛st톫ildx퉝c팳톛d st퉢iwi톫.
2. them Q by the+apostles 10 and the 2 the made the believing+I religion
2. Is it the twelve apostles that made the religion that I believe in?
E, tsahadilh lesapot ololob eku sesale ku tu hoyud kwa astlelduhched s'tewielh.
툾i, c톛di톫 lesapot 툾ulub 툾i k퉝i s톛sa툾li툾 k퉝i tuhuyud k퉝(i) 툾톛st톫ildx퉝c팳톛d st퉢iwi톫.
yes them the+apostles 10 and the 2 the made the believing+I religion
Yes, it is the twelve apostles that made the religion that I believe in.
3. Elid kwa astlelduhched s'tewielh?
3. 툾ilid k퉝(i) 툾톛st톫ildx퉝c팳톛d st퉢iwi톫.
3. repeat the believing+I religion.
3 Repeat the religion that I believe in.
Astlelduhched ku Sherk-Siam Ban, &c. page 6.
툾톛st톫ildx퉝 c팳톛d k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab bad, &c. page 6.
believe+i the sky nobleman father, &c. page 6.
I believe in God the Father, &c. page 6.
